name: util_admin_notes_list
_purpose: GET /webhook/admin-notes-list?project_id=<uuid> (header x-api-key). Si project_id se omite, devuelve todas las notas del estudio. Cierra el ciclo de project_notes (crear via util_admin_note + ver pinned en util_admin_project_view_html + toggle/delete via util_admin_note_toggle + listar via este).
_response: { project_id, count, notes: [{id, body, category, pinned, created_at, created_by, project_id, project_name}] } orden: pinned DESC, created_at DESC

parameters.query:
WITH q AS (SELECT NULLIF(trim($1),'') AS pid)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'project_id', (SELECT pid FROM q),
  'count', count(*),
  'notes', json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.pinned DESC, t.created_at DESC)
) AS report FROM (
  SELECT n.id, n.body, n.category, n.pinned, n.created_at, n.created_by,
         p.id AS project_id, p.name AS project_name
    FROM project_notes n
    LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = n.project_id
   WHERE (SELECT pid FROM q) IS NULL
      OR n.project_id = (SELECT pid FROM q)::uuid
) t;
